name: Get Weather
description: Look up the current weather for a city. Use this tool when the user asks about today's conditions, temperature, or simple weather-based advice such as whether they should bring a jacket or umbrella. The tool returns the city name, temperature unit, current condition, and a short suggestion.

city.description: Name of the city to check, for example Beijing or Shanghai.

name: Search Flights
description: Search for flight options between two cities on a specific travel date. Use this tool when the user wants help planning a trip, comparing departures, or finding a reasonable option to book next. The tool returns candidate flights with departure time, arrival time, and price.

date.description: Travel date in YYYY-MM-DD format, for example 2026-04-10.

name: Search Hotels
description: Search for hotel options in a city or near a landmark. Use this tool when the user asks where to stay, especially when they care about a district, business area, or attraction. The tool returns hotel names, nightly prices, and ratings to support a quick recommendation.

city.description: City where the user wants accommodation.

district.description: Preferred neighborhood, district, or landmark area, such as the Bund.

check_in.description: Check-in date in YYYY-MM-DD format, for example 2026-04-10.

check_out.description: Check-out date in YYYY-MM-DD format, for example 2026-04-12.
